text: [ e Y T ) said: “There are fie things, whosver dies of any of them is a (IBHYE. The one who is kiled in the cause of Allah is a [HYF: the one who dies of an ‘abdominal complain in the cause of Alh is IBHYE the one who dies of the plague in the cause of Alh s a [HYF: and the woman who dies in ildbirth i the cause of Allh s a IRSERL" Grade: Sahih (Darussalam) P
